queries.query: Compare how Neural networks, Transformers, and Large language models are related to one another.
queries.groundTruth: Neural networks are the foundational machine learning concept. Transformers are a specific architecture of neural networks based on self-attention. Large language models (LLMs) are massive applications built using the Transformer neural network architecture.

queries.query: Provide a comprehensive summary of Retrieval-augmented generation.
queries.groundTruth: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a framework that combines an information retrieval system with a generative LLM. RAG queries a vector database for relevant documents, then feeds those documents alongside the original prompt to the LLM to prevent hallucinations.
